DOCTRINE_PROPORTIONALITY.label: Proportionality Principle (Ölçülülük İlkesi)
requires: [AND — sequential three-prong test (German Verhältnismäßigkeit)]
Elverişlilik (suitability): The measure must be apt to achieve the legitimate aim
Gereklilik (necessity): No less restrictive alternative exists; selection of the mildest means (en yumuşak aracın seçilmesi)
Orantılılık (proportionality stricto sensu): The burden on the individual must not be disproportionate to the public interest served
defeaters: Measure not suitable to achieve the stated aim
Less restrictive alternative exists (en yumuşak aracın seçilmesi)
Burden on individual disproportionate to public interest (bireye aşırı külfet)
Essence of the right is touched → unconstitutional a fortiori (no proportionality needed)
DOCTRINE_PROPORTIONALITY.key_phrases: "ölçülülük ilkesi", "olcululuk ilkesi", "elverişlilik", "elverislilik", "gereklilik", "orantılılık", "orantililik", "meşru amaca ulaşmaya elverişli", "mesru amaca ulasmaya elverisli", "daha hafif bir müdahale aracı", "daha hafif bir mudahale araci", "bireye aşırı külfet", "bireye asiri kulfet", "adil denge", "zorlayıcı toplumsal ihtiyaç", "zorlayici toplumsal ihtiyac"
DOCTRINE_PROPORTIONALITY.origin: German Verhältnismäßigkeitsprinzip; introduced via Christian Rumpf (1993 AYM symposium) and Yüksel Metin (2002 comparative study)

DOCTRINE_CORE_ESSENCE_OF_RIGHTS.label: Essence of the Right / Core Right Protection (Özüne Dokunma Yasağı)
DOCTRINE_CORE_ESSENCE_OF_RIGHTS.parent: Article 13, 1982 Constitution — restored by 2001 amendment (Law No. 4709)
DOCTRINE_CORE_ESSENCE_OF_RIGHTS.establishing_cases: AYM, E.1962/208, K.1963/1, 4/1/1963 (foundational definition under 1961 Constitution)
requires: [AND — threshold test]
A fundamental right or freedom is at issue
The limitation explicitly prohibits, covertly renders unusable, seriously impedes, prevents attainment of purpose, or eliminates effectiveness of the right
defeaters: None — if essence is touched, unconstitutional a fortiori without proportionality analysis
Öze dokunan sınırlamalar are evleviyetle (a fortiori) contrary to democratic society requirements
DOCTRINE_CORE_ESSENCE_OF_RIGHTS.typical_edge_pattern: (Limitation) --[touches essence?]--> (Özüne_Dokunma_Test) --[if essence touched]--> (Unconstitutional_A_Fortiori — no proportionality needed)

DOCTRINE_RULE_OF_LAW.label: Rule of Law (Hukuk Devleti)
requires: [AND — composite principle]
State based on human rights, protecting and strengthening them
All state actions and transactions conform to law
Just legal order established and maintained in all areas
State bound by Constitution and laws
Open to judicial review
defeaters: Violation of hukuki güvenlik (legal security) — individuals cannot rely on the state
Violation of hukuki belirlilik (legal certainty) — laws not clear, precise, and applicable
Violation of kazanılmış hak (acquired/vested rights)

sub_principles: Kazanılmış Haklara Saygı (respect for acquired/vested rights)

DOCTRINE_EQUALITY.label: Equality Principle (Eşitlik İlkesi)
DOCTRINE_EQUALITY.establishing_cases: AYM, E.1986/11, K.1986/26, 4/11/1986 (foundational equality definition), AYM, Tuğba Arslan [GK], B. No: 2014/256, 25/6/2014 (bireysel başvuru leading case on Art 10 discrimination), AYM, Onurhan Solmaz, B. No: 2012/1049, 26/3/2013 (equality requires bağlantılı hak — accessory nature established), AYM, E.2009/47, K.2011/51, 17/3/2011 (same legal situations = same rules)
requires: [AND — three-stage sequential test (closest to ECtHR Art. 14)]
Stage 1: Muamele farklılığının tespiti — Whether persons in same/similar legal positions face different treatment
Stage 2: Makul ve nesnel gerekçe — Whether the different treatment has an objective and reasonable justification
Stage 3: Orantılılık testi — Whether proportionality exists between the restriction and its legitimate aim
defeaters: Differential treatment has objective and reasonable justification (nesnel ve makul gerekçe)
Proportionality satisfied between restriction and legitimate aim
Positive measures for women, children, elderly, disabled (2010 amendment) — not equality violation
DOCTRINE_EQUALITY.typical_edge_pattern: (Differential_Treatment) --[Stage 1: established]--> (Burden_Shifts_to_State) --[Stage 2: no justification]--> (Stage 3: disproportionate) --[if fails]--> (Art 10 Violation)

DOCTRINE_EQUALITY.echr_parallel: ECHR Article 14 (methodology_note: closest to Zarb Adami v. Malta)
signal_phrases_tr: karşılaştırılmaya müsait şekilde benzer durumda bulunanlar
karsilastirilmaya musait sekilde benzer durumda bulunanlar
DOCTRINE_EQUALITY.burden_of_proof: Shifts to state once applicant demonstrates differential treatment

DOCTRINE_NON_RETROACTIVITY.label: Non-Retroactivity (Geriye Yürümezlik İlkesi)
DOCTRINE_NON_RETROACTIVITY.parent: Article 38, 1982 Constitution (criminal); Rule of Law principle (civil/admin)
requires: [Criminal — absolute prohibition]
No punishment for acts not criminal at time of commission (Art. 38)
Sole exception: lex mitior (lehe kanun) — TCK m.7/2 requires retroactive application of more favorable criminal law
[Civil/Administrative — qualified prohibition]
True retroactivity (gerçek geriye yürüme): applying new rules to completed legal relationships — generally prohibited
Quasi-retroactivity (gerçek olmayan geriye yürüme): applying new rules to ongoing situations — not strictly prohibited
defeaters: Criminal: absolute — no defeaters except lex mitior
Admin withdrawal: only for açık hata (manifest error), hile (fraud), or gerçek dışı beyan (false declaration) — Danıştay İBK
DOCTRINE_NON_RETROACTIVITY.typical_edge_pattern: (New_Law) --[temporal scope]--> (Gerçek_Geriye_Yürüme? / Gerçek_Olmayan?) --[if true retroactivity without exception]--> (Unconstitutional)
DOCTRINE_NON_RETROACTIVITY.key_phrases: "geriye yürümezlik", "geriye yurumezlik", "lehe kanun", "gerçek geriye yürüme", "gercek geriye yurume", "gerçek olmayan geriye yürüme", "gercek olmayan geriye yurume", "kazanılmış hak", "kazanilmis hak", "açık hata", "acik hata"

DOCTRINE_LEGITIMATE_EXPECTATION.key_phrases: "haklı beklenti", "hakli beklenti", "meşru beklenti", "mesru beklenti", "muntazar hak", "hukuki güvenlik", "hukuki guvenlik", "idari istikrar", "baskın kamu yararı", "baskin kamu yarari"

DOCTRINE_BIREYSEL_BASVURU.label: Individual Application (Bireysel Başvuru)
requires: [AND — admissibility criteria (Law 6216, art. 48)]
Exhaustion of remedies (Olağan başvuru yollarının tüketilmesi): AYM is subsidiary — ikincil nitelikte bir hak arama yolu
30-day time limit (30 günlük başvuru süresi): From notification of final domestic decision
Manifestly ill-founded (Açıkça dayanaktan yoksun): AYM is not a süper temyiz mercii (super-appellate court)

Constitutional significance AND significant disadvantage (Anayasal önem VE önemli bir zarar (conjunctive)): Under 6216/48(2): application dismissed if NOT important for constitutional interpretation AND applicant has NOT suffered significant disadvantage. Both conditions must be met for dismissal.
Ratione personae (Kişi bakımından yetki): Natural/private legal persons only — no public entities
Ratione materiae (Konu bakımından yetki): Must fall in AYM/ECHR common protection area
Ratione temporis (Zaman bakımından yetki): Only post-23/9/2012 violations
defeaters: Non-exhaustion of ordinary remedies (AYM is subsidiary — ikincil nitelik)
30-day time limit expired
Manifestly ill-founded (AYM not a süper temyiz mercii)
Conjunctive dismissal: NOT constitutionally significant AND no significant disadvantage (Law 6216/48(2))
Public entity applicant (ratione personae — natural/private legal persons only)
DOCTRINE_BIREYSEL_BASVURU.typical_edge_pattern: (Application) --[admissibility]--> (Exhaustion + Time_Limit + Not_Manifestly_Ill_Founded + Significance/Disadvantage + Personae + Materiae) --[if all met]--> (Merits_Examination)

DOCTRINE_ADMINISTRATIVE_REVIEW.label: Administrative Judicial Review (İdari İşlem Denetimi)
DOCTRINE_ADMINISTRATIVE_REVIEW.parent: İYUK m.2/1(a); French administrative law origin; Article 125 Constitution
DOCTRINE_ADMINISTRATIVE_REVIEW.establishing_cases: AYM, E.2012/102, K.2012/207, 27/12/2012 (scope of Art 125 judicial review), Danıştay İBGK, E.1979/2, K.1979/2, 22/12/1979 (foundational iptal davası scope), AYM, E.2014/149, K.2014/151, 2/10/2014 (no administrative act immune from review — Art 125)
requires: [AND — five-element review (Danıştay)]
Yetki (competence): İdare hukukunda asıl olan yetkisizliktir — incompetence is the default
Şekil (form/procedure): Acts must be written and properly notified
Sebep (cause): Administration bears burden of proving factual and legal grounds
Konu (subject matter): Content must be lawful and possible
Amaç (purpose): All acts must serve kamu yararı
defeaters: Yerindelik denetimi yasağı — court cannot substitute its assessment of merit/expediency
Fonksiyon gaspı (usurpation of governmental function) → absolute nullity
Yetki tecavüzü (encroachment) → annullable
Yetki saptırması (détournement de pouvoir) — using power for personal/political purposes
DOCTRINE_ADMINISTRATIVE_REVIEW.typical_edge_pattern: (Administrative_Act) --[five-element review]--> (Yetki + Şekil + Sebep + Konu + Amaç) --[if any defective]--> (Annulment)
DOCTRINE_ADMINISTRATIVE_REVIEW.key_phrases: "idari işlem", "idari islem", "yetki", "şekil", "sekil", "sebep", "konu", "amaç", "amac", "yerindelik denetimi yasağı", "yerindelik denetimi yasagi", "yetki saptırması", "yetki saptirmasi", "fonksiyon gaspı", "fonksiyon gaspi", "iptal davası", "iptal davasi", "kamu yararı", "kamu yarari"

ARTICLE_13_LIMITATION_CLAUSE.label: General Limitation Clause (Temel Hak ve Hürriyetlerin Sınırlanması)
requires: [AND — five cumulative requirements for any limitation]
Only by law (ancak kanunla)
Only for reasons specified in the relevant article (ilgili maddede belirtilen sebeplere bağlı)
Without touching the essence of the right (özlerine dokunulmaksızın)

Proportionate (ölçülülük ilkesi)
defeaters: No legal basis → unconstitutional
Reason not specified in relevant article → unconstitutional
Essence of right touched → unconstitutional a fortiori
Not necessary in democratic society → unconstitutional
Disproportionate → unconstitutional

ARTICLE_35_PROPERTY.label: Right to Property (Mülkiyet Hakkı)
ARTICLE_35_PROPERTY.establishing_cases: Türkiye İş Bankası A.Ş. [GK], B. No: 2014/6192, 12/11/2014 (foundational framework), Abdullah Tantaş ve diğerleri [GK], B. No: 2018/2739, 15/12/2021 (imar kısıtlılığı), Hüseyin Ünal, B. No: 2017/24715, 20/9/2018
requires: [AND — five-stage sequential test]
Stage 1: Mülk var mı? — Does 'property' (mülk) exist? Includes existing possessions and legitimate expectations (meşru beklenti)

Stage 2: Müdahale var mı? — Is there interference? Classified under three rules: (a) mülkiyetten barışçıl yararlanma (peaceful enjoyment — 1st rule), (b) mülkiyetten yoksun bırakma (deprivation — 2nd rule), (c) mülkiyetin kullanımının kontrolü (control of use — 3rd rule)
Stage 3: Kanunilik — Legal basis must be foreseeable, accessible, and of sufficient quality
Stage 4: Meşru amaç / Kamu yararı — Wide margin for public interest determination
Stage 5: Ölçülülük / Adil denge — Fair balance between public interest and individual burden; compensation adequacy is central in deprivation cases
defeaters: Fair balance found; adequate compensation at market value
Interference within margin of appreciation
No 'mülk' within Art 35 meaning (no existing possession or legitimate expectation)
Failure to exhaust remedies
Ratione temporis (pre-23/9/2012)
ARTICLE_35_PROPERTY.typical_edge_pattern: (Property_Interference) --[three-rule classification]--> (Deprivation / Control_of_Use / Peaceful_Enjoyment) --[kanunilik + meşru amaç + adil denge]--> (If_Disproportionate) --[Art 35 Violation]
ARTICLE_35_PROPERTY.key_phrases: "mülkiyet hakkı", "mulkiyet hakki", "mülkiyetten yoksun bırakma", "mulkiyetten yoksun birakma", "mülkiyetin kullanımının kontrolü", "mulkiyetin kullaniminin kontrolu", "adil denge", "orantısız külfet", "orantisiz kulfet", "kamulaştırma bedeli", "kamulastirma bedeli", "kamulaştırmasız el atma", "kamulastirmasiz el atma", "meşru beklenti", "mesru beklenti", "kamu yararı ile bireysel yarar", "kamu yarari ile bireysel yarar"
signal_phrases_tr: kamu yararı ile bireysel yarar arasında adil denge
kamu yarari ile bireysel yarar arasinda adil denge

three_rule_typology.rule_1_peaceful_enjoyment: Mülkiyete saygı / barışçıl yararlanma — residual general principle
three_rule_typology.rule_2_deprivation: Mülkiyetten yoksun bırakma — kamulaştırma, kamulaştırmasız el atma. Requires gerçek bedel (fair compensation) per Art 46
three_rule_typology.rule_3_control_of_use: Mülkiyetin kullanımının kontrolü — el koyma/kayyım atama, müsadere, vergisel müdahaleler, ruhsat/lisans iptalleri, imar kısıtlılığı. Wider margin of appreciation

ARTICLE_17_RIGHT_TO_LIFE.label: Right to Life and Prohibition of Torture (Yaşam Hakkı / Kötü Muamele Yasağı)
ARTICLE_17_RIGHT_TO_LIFE.establishing_cases: Serpil Kerimoğlu ve diğerleri, B. No: 2012/752, 17/9/2013 (first bireysel başvuru right-to-life decision), Rahil Dink ve diğerleri, B. No: 2012/848, 17/7/2014 (investigation adequacy standards), T.A. [GK], B. No: 2017/32972, 29/9/2021 (deterrent sanctions requirement)
requires: [AND — two dimensions]
[Substantive obligation (maddi boyut)]
Negative: State must not unlawfully take life
Positive: (a) establish effective legal framework, (b) take preventive operational measures against known real/immediate risk (Osman test), (c) protect persons in custody
Use of force: must be 'mutlak zorunluluk' (absolutely necessary)
[Procedural obligation (usul boyutu — etkili soruşturma)]
Resen ve derhal başlatılma — ex officio and immediate initiation
Yeterlilik — adequacy (means obligation, not results)
Bağımsızlık — institutional independence of investigators
Mağdur katılımı — victim/relative participation
Makul sürede sonuçlandırılma — conclusion within reasonable time
Cezasızlık yasağı / Caydırıcı yaptırım — deterrent sanctions, no impunity
defeaters: Investigation adequate despite no conviction (means vs. results obligation)
Mağdur sıfatı lost through effective investigation + compensation
Civil/administrative remedies suffice for non-intentional harm (Calvelli and Ciglio approach)
Ratione temporis
ARTICLE_17_RIGHT_TO_LIFE.typical_edge_pattern: (State_Action_or_Omission) --[Art 17 test]--> (Maddi_Boyut: Substantive / Usul_Boyutu: Procedural) --[if substantive or procedural obligation breached]--> (Art 17 Violation)
ARTICLE_17_RIGHT_TO_LIFE.key_phrases: "yaşam hakkı", "yasam hakki", "maddi boyut", "usul boyutu", "etkili soruşturma yükümlülüğü", "etkili sorusturma yukumlulugu", "devletin yaşamı koruma yükümlülüğü", "devletin yasami koruma yukumlulugu", "mutlak zorunluluk", "kötü muamele yasağı", "kotu muamele yasagi", "işkence yasağı", "iskence yasagi", "cezasızlığın önlenmesi", "cezasizligin onlenmesi", "maddi ve manevi varlığın korunması", "maddi ve manevi varligin korunmasi"
ARTICLE_17_RIGHT_TO_LIFE.echr_parallel: Art 17/1 → ECHR Art 2 (right to life); Art 17/3 → ECHR Art 3 (torture prohibition)
signal_phrases_tr: maddi ve manevi varlığın korunması ve geliştirilmesi hakkı
maddi ve manevi varligin korunmasi ve gelistirilmesi hakki

ARTICLE_34_ASSEMBLY.label: Freedom of Assembly (Toplantı ve Gösteri Yürüyüşü Düzenleme Hakkı)
ARTICLE_34_ASSEMBLY.establishing_cases: Ali Rıza Özer ve diğerleri, B. No: 2013/3924, 6/1/2015 (tear gas without warning), Osman Erbil, B. No: 2013/2394, 25/3/2015, DİSK ve diğerleri [GK], B. No: 2016/14517, 12/10/2023 (venue selection freedom — Taksim/1 Mayıs)
requires: [AND — scope and limitation test]
Scope: Protects peaceful (barışçıl), unarmed (silahsız), non-aggressive (saldırısız) assembly

Tolerans yükümlülüğü — State must show tolerance to peaceful protests even if causing some disruption

Meşru amaç (legitimate aim)
Demokratik toplumda gereklilik / Ölçülülük (necessity in democratic society / proportionality)

Legitimate organizational activities genuinely connected to terrorism
Proportionate sanction for genuinely dangerous conduct
OHAL measures proportionate under Art 15

DOCTRINE_POSITIVE_OBLIGATIONS.label: Positive Obligations Doctrine (Pozitif Yükümlülük Doktrini)
DOCTRINE_POSITIVE_OBLIGATIONS.parent: Constitution Art 5 (State's fundamental duties) + specific rights articles
DOCTRINE_POSITIVE_OBLIGATIONS.establishing_cases: Türkiye İş Bankası A.Ş. [GK], B. No: 2014/6192, 12/11/2014 (property positive obligations), Serpil Kerimoğlu ve diğerleri, B. No: 2012/752, 17/9/2013 (life — investigation), Züliye Öztürk, B. No: 2014/1734, 14/9/2017 (protection from private interference)
requires: [AND — state duties beyond non-interference]
Negative duty: State must refrain from interference (negatif yükümlülük)
Positive duty: State must take affirmative protection measures (pozitif yükümlülük)
Includes: (a) establish effective legal framework, (b) take preventive operational measures, (c) provide effective judicial protection against third-party violations
Standard: 'makul pratik tedbirlerin alınması' — reasonable practical measures, not impossible/disproportionate burden on state
defeaters: State took reasonable measures (means obligation, not results)
Risk was not known or foreseeable
Measures would impose impossible/disproportionate burden on state
DOCTRINE_POSITIVE_OBLIGATIONS.typical_edge_pattern: (State_Omission_or_Third_Party_Harm) --[positive obligation test]--> (Effective_Legal_Framework? + Preventive_Measures? + Judicial_Protection?) --[if state failed reasonable measures]--> (Positive_Obligation_Violation)

DOCTRINE_EFFECTIVE_INVESTIGATION.label: Effective Investigation Obligation (Etkili Soruşturma Yükümlülüğü)
DOCTRINE_EFFECTIVE_INVESTIGATION.parent: Article 17 procedural dimension; ECHR Jordan Principles (Hugh Jordan v. UK, 2001)
DOCTRINE_EFFECTIVE_INVESTIGATION.establishing_cases: Serpil Kerimoğlu ve diğerleri, B. No: 2012/752, 17/9/2013, Rahil Dink ve diğerleri, B. No: 2012/848, 17/7/2014 (comprehensive standard-setting), Naif Bal (2), B. No: 2015/2465, 11/9/2019 (HAGB creates impunity → violation)
requires: [AND — six cumulative requirements (Jordan Principles adapted)]
Resen ve derhal başlatılma — ex officio and immediate initiation
Yeterlilik — adequacy (means obligation, not results obligation)
Bağımsızlık — institutional independence of investigators from those implicated
Mağdur katılımı — victim/relative participation in proceedings
Makul sürede sonuçlandırılma — conclusion within reasonable time
Cezasızlık yasağı / Caydırıcı yaptırım — deterrent sanctions; no effective impunity through HAGB or similar devices
defeaters: Investigation adequate despite no conviction (means vs. results)
Victim lost mağdur sıfatı through full investigation + adequate compensation
Non-intentional harm: civil/administrative remedies may suffice
DOCTRINE_EFFECTIVE_INVESTIGATION.typical_edge_pattern: (Death_or_Ill_Treatment) --[investigation obligation]--> (Resen + Yeterlilik + Bağımsızlık + Katılım + Süre + Cezasızlık) --[if any fails]--> (Art 17 Usul Violation)

DOCTRINE_PILOT_JUDGMENT.parent: AYM İçtüzüğü, Madde 75; ECtHR Rule 61 (Broniowski v. Poland, 2004)
DOCTRINE_PILOT_JUDGMENT.establishing_cases: Y.T. [GK], B. No: 2016/22418, 30/5/2019 (first formal AYM pilot — deportation), Keskin Kalem Yayıncılık [GK], B. No: 2018/14884, 27/10/2021 (BİK press advertising ban), Nevriye Kuruç [GK], B. No: 2021/58970, 5/7/2022 (reasonable time — 16,887 prior violations), Caner Şafak [GK], B. No: 2024/41763, 8/7/2025 (munzam zarar property)
requires: [AND — pilot judgment trigger and procedure]
Violation stems from a yapısal sorun (structural problem)
Problem generates or is likely to generate multiple similar applications
AYM selects representative case → identifies structural problem → specifies remedial measures
Notifies TBMM (legislature) of structural problem and required legislative action
Sets deadline (typically 1 year) for legislative remedy
Adjourns similar pending applications (İçtüzük 75/5)

Legislative remedy enacted within deadline
AYM determines structural problem has been adequately addressed

DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.label: Democratic Society Requirement (Demokratik Toplum Düzeninin Gerekleri)
DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.parent: Article 13, 1982 Constitution — 'demokratik toplum düzeninin ve lâik Cumhuriyetin gereklerine aykırı olamaz'
requires: [AND — overarching limitation framework within which proportionality operates]
Çoğulculuk (pluralism): democratic society is founded on pluralism
Hoşgörü (tolerance): requires tolerance of dissenting views
Açık fikirlilik (open-mindedness): society that considers diverse positions
Restriction must respond to a toplumsal ihtiyaç (pressing social need)
Restriction must be the en son çare (last resort / least restrictive means)
Proportionality (ölçülülük) operates within this democratic society framework
defeaters: Restriction is proportionate and addresses pressing social need in a pluralist society
Restriction does not suppress pluralism or opposing views
DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.typical_edge_pattern: (Rights_Limitation) --[demokratik toplum test]--> (Çoğulculuk + Hoşgörü + Toplumsal_İhtiyaç + En_Son_Çare + Ölçülülük) --[if inconsistent with democratic society]--> (Unconstitutional)
DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.key_phrases: "demokratik toplum düzeninin gerekleri", "demokratik toplum duzeninin gerekleri", "çoğulculuk", "cogulculuk", "hoşgörü", "hosgoru", "açık fikirlilik", "acik fikirlilik", "zorlayıcı toplumsal ihtiyaç", "zorlayici toplumsal ihtiyac", "en son çare", "en son care", "demokratik toplumda gereklilik"
DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.echr_parallel: 'Necessary in a democratic society' in ECHR Arts 8-11
DOCTRINE_DEMOCRATIC_SOCIETY.relationship_to_proportionality: Not identical to ölçülülük. Democratic society requirement is the broader framework; ölçülülük (elverişlilik → gereklilik → orantılılık) operates as one component within it.

DOCTRINE_COMPENSATION_REDRESS.label: Compensation and Redress (Tazminat ve Giderim Doktrini)
DOCTRINE_COMPENSATION_REDRESS.establishing_cases: Mehmet Doğan [GK], B. No: 2014/8875, 7/6/2018 (definitive case on remedy principles — yeniden yargılama framework)
requires: [OR — three principal remedies]
Yeniden yargılama (retrial): primary remedy when violation stems from court decision. Retrial court has no discretion to refuse when AYM orders it.
Tazminat (compensation): maddi tazminat + manevi tazminat. Applied when retrial serves no legal interest. Maliye Bakanlığı must pay within 4 months.
İhlalin sonuçlarının ortadan kaldırılması: overarching eski hâle getirme (restitutio in integrum) principle. AYM may direct specific administrative or judicial actions.
alternatives: [OR — remedy selection depends on violation type]
Administrative violation → specific administrative remedy + compensation
defeaters: Violation already remedied by domestic courts
Retrial would serve no legal interest
Non-execution of retrial order = second violation (Aligül Alkaya (2), B. No: 2016/12506, 7/11/2019)

DOCTRINE_EXHAUSTION_OF_REMEDIES.label: Exhaustion of Remedies (Başvuru Yollarının Tüketilmesi)
DOCTRINE_EXHAUSTION_OF_REMEDIES.establishing_cases: Ferat Yüksel, B. No: 2014/13828, 12/9/2018 (Tazminat Komisyonu as effective remedy)
requires: [AND — exhaustion requirements]
Only olağan kanun yolları (ordinary remedies) must be exhausted — not extraordinary (yargılamanın yenilenmesi, kanun yararına bozma)
Remedies must be mevcut (existing), erişilebilir (accessible), and etkili (effective)
30-day filing deadline from kesinleşme tarihi (finalization date)
No aşırı şekilcilik (excessive formalism) in calculating deadlines
[Right-specific requirements]
Art 17 (non-intentional): tazminat davası may suffice
Art 19 (detention — released): CMK Art 141 compensation first
Art 35 (property): idare mahkemesi routes first
Art 36 (reasonable time): Tazminat Komisyonu first (post-Nevriye Kuruç)
alternatives: No effective remedy exists in the legal system
Settled unfavorable Yargıtay/Danıştay case law renders remedy futile
defeaters: Ordinary remedies not exhausted → inadmissible
30-day deadline expired → inadmissible
Effective remedy existed and was accessible

DOCTRINE_PRESS_SPECIAL_PROTECTION.label: Press Freedom Special Protection Doctrines (Basın Özgürlüğü Özel Koruma)
DOCTRINE_PRESS_SPECIAL_PROTECTION.parent: Articles 26, 28, 1982 Constitution; ECHR Art 10 press jurisprudence
DOCTRINE_PRESS_SPECIAL_PROTECTION.establishing_cases: Erdem Gül ve Can Dündar [GK], B. No: 2015/18567, 25/2/2016, Şahin Alpay [GK], B. No: 2016/16092, 11/1/2018, Keskin Kalem Yayıncılık [GK], B. No: 2018/14884, 27/10/2021
requires: [AND — three sub-doctrines]
Public watchdog role (Kamunun Bekçi Köpeği): press is 'demokratik toplumun zorunlu temellerinden biri'; journalists may use offensive, shocking, disturbing expressions
Chilling effect doctrine (Caydırıcı Etki): applied to detention, compensation awards, advertising bans. Finding chilling effect = disproportionate interference.
Political figures tolerance: wider criticism permissible; public interest in debate prevails
Source protection: journalists may contact diverse sources including organization members
defeaters: Journalist acted as direct participant in criminal activity rather than reporter

Restriction was proportionate and did not create measurable chilling effect

case_law_hierarchy.description: No formal stare decisis. İçtihadı Birleştirme Kararları (IBK) are the sole formally binding precedent type (Yargıtay/Danıştay plenary assemblies resolving conflicting chambers, published in Resmi Gazete). AYM decisions bind all organs (Art. 153/6). Regular case-law (yerleşik içtihat) is persuasive but not formally binding.

aym_general_assembly.authority: Highest for constitutional matters — norm control and bireysel başvuru (GK)

ictihadi_birlestirme.description: İçtihadı Birleştirme Kararları — formally binding decisions resolving conflicting chamber decisions
ictihadi_birlestirme.character: Published in Resmi Gazete; binding until changed by new İBK

can_atalay_crisis.description: Unprecedented: Yargıtay refused AYM bireysel başvuru implementation (2023-2024) — unresolved constitutional crisis
can_atalay_crisis.implication: Binding effect of AYM decisions (Art. 153/6) contested in practice

editorial_conventions.absolutist_language: must/never/always in requires/defeaters = Court's own categorical holdings. Narrative uses softer language unless truly categorical.
editorial_conventions.bilingual_convention: Turkish terms preserved alongside English translations. Signal phrases stored in original Turkish for NLP extraction. ASCII-normalized forms provided for robust matching.
editorial_conventions.primary_vs_secondary: All concept establishing_cases are primary (judgments/decisions). Academic sources (Mumcuoğlu et al. 2021, Aydemir et al. 2025) are secondary dataset context, not authority.

orthography_normalization.description: For robust matching, store both original Turkish and ASCII-normalized tokens
